message:
test(fuzz): required_quorum + QuorumPolicy + SignatureSet (hahie)

Add fuzz_required_quorum covering NORMATIVE Byzantine-quorum sizing
and signature-set canonicalization (quorum.rs:179-444). Properties:
required_quorum tier values (Safe=1, Risky=f+1, Dangerous=CriticalWrite=n-f);
Dangerous == CriticalWrite at the function level; tier monotonicity
(Safe ≤ Risky ≤ Dangerous); result ≤ n; QuorumPolicy::required_signatures
agrees with required_quorum; is_quorum_met semantics;
can_proceed_degraded matrix (only Safe tier under enabled-degraded mode
when available >= floor); SignatureSet::add dedup by node_id with
sorted-output invariant; satisfies_quorum agreement; canonical_bytes
deterministic. Once-gated anchors verify each branch on hand-picked
(n=4,f=1) and (n=7,f=2) inputs and confirm degraded mode rejects
Risky/Dangerous tiers explicitly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
